justification: Contains 'jobs' — recruitment intent, never converts for a delivery service
Free-seeking modifier; unconditionally blocks brand unless a free-tier offer exists
Resale intent; low conversion but not zero if brand sells packaging accessories
Competitor brand name with voucher intent; exclude unless conquesting is in scope
Campaign targets mainland UK metro only; NI delivery may not be available
Audience intent is human groceries; pet-only shoppers are out of scope
